issues.sample: Airbag light came on saying there is something wrong with my car. No recalls for this vehicle even though this is a huge safety concern and is by default a problem with how the manufacturer made the vehicle.

narrative.headline: What 2017 Mitsubishi Lancer owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Airbag light came on saying there is something wrong with my car. No recalls for this vehicle even though this is a huge safety concern and is by default a problem with how the manufacturer made the vehicle.
